title: Find My Device - Don't Allow - Enable now - Allow Once [Only This Time - Android] [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: User navigates Find My Device flow with HS connected, denies permission, taps "Enable Now", and grants location with "Ask Next Time" option.
steps: 1. Start the app with the headset (HS) connected.
2. Navigate to the 'Find My Device' feature.
3. Tap 'Don't Allow' when the permission popup appears.
4. Tap 'Enable Now' on the subsequent prompt.
5. Grant location permission by selecting 'Ask Next Time or When I Share' option.
expected: Permission popups with options "Allow Once", "Allow while using app", "Don't Allow" appear at appropriate steps. Tapping "Enable Now" navigates to settings.
